creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Fri, Jan 31, 2014 at 11:35:20PM +0000, Matthew Pounsett wrote:
> Subversion is unable to negotiate an SSL connection with
> https://svn0.us-east.freebsd.org.   It consistently results in the
> error:
> svn: E120171: Unable to connect to a repository at URL 'https://svn0.us-east.freebsd.org/base/releng/9.2'
> svn: E120171: Error running context: An error occurred during SSL communication
> 

Is this during initial checkout, or an update?

Please provide output from 'pkg info subversion'.

Glen
